text:
# LiveAzan — Production Environment
# Copy this file to .env.prod and set strong secrets before deploying.
# These values are used by docker-compose.prod.yml

DB_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME_use_a_strong_password
JWT_SECRET=CHANGE_ME_use_a_long_random_secret_at_least_48_chars

# Admin account created on first startup — CHANGE THESE before deploying
ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@liveaszan.com
ADMIN_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME_strong_password

# OAuth credentials (optional — fill in when ready)
# GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
# GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=
# APPLE_CLIENT_ID=
# APPLE_TEAM_ID=
# APPLE_KEY_ID=
# MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID=
# MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET=
